mapper.select: SELECT 'whiteNUM' AS filter_group, CAST(whitelist_number_seq AS CHAR) AS id, phone_num AS data, category, memo, save_dt AS date FROM customer_whitelist_number WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID} UNION ALL SELECT 'whitePattern' AS filter_group, CAST(whitelist_word_seq AS CHAR) AS id, pattern AS data, category, memo, save_dt AS date FROM customer_whitelist_word WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID} UNION ALL SELECT 'whiteNUMAddr' AS filter_group, CAST(address_number_seq AS CHAR) AS id, phone_num AS data, '' AS category, '' AS memo, save_dt AS date FROM customer_address_number WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_whitelist_number ( cust_num, phone_num, category, memo, save_dt ) VALUES ( #{custNum}, #{data}, #{category}, #{memo}, #{saveDt} )
INSERT INTO customer_whitelist_word ( cust_num, pattern, category, memo, save_dt ) VALUES ( #{custNum}, #{data}, #{category}, #{memo}, #{saveDt} )
INSERT INTO tb_user_filter ( user_id, filter_type, filter_value, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{filterType}, #{filterValue}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_filter SET filter_type = #{filterType}, filter_value = #{filterValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE filter_seq = #{filterSeq} AND user_id = #{userId}
